queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Statistical relationship between the credit amount requested and reduced credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers associated with savings account status below 100 DM and increased default likelihood.
